data.title: AMD Stock Falls Over 3% In Thursday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: The stock of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMD) declined 2.89% in the pre-market trading session on Thursday. after being downgraded by Jefferies.

data.title: Alibaba Strikes Back With New AI Model To Rival DeepSeek In China
data.description: Alibaba launched a new AI model Qwen2.5-Omni-7B that can process multiple inputs and generate real-time responses. It's open-sourced and can be deployed on edge devices. It's part of China's AI boom, with Alibaba investing heavily in cloud and AI infrastructure.

data.title: Rocket Lab Completes Mission For German Wildfire Detection Firm, Targets 20+ Launches In 2025
data.description: Rocket Lab USA reveals successful launch for wildfire detection company OroraTech, deploying 8 satellites in 4 months.

data.title: Billionaire Investor Ray Dalio Warns Of Looming Debt Crisis And Shifting Global Order Amid Trump's Hardline Trade Policies
data.description: Billionaire hedge fund manager Ray Dalio is sounding the alarm about a looming debt crisis, the changing global political order, and the implications of U.S. President Donald Trump's increasingly hostile approach to international trade and diplomacy.

data.title: Arthur Hayes On Bitcoin Trading: Focus On Fiat Liquidity, Not Price Targets
data.description: Arthur Hayes, co-founder of cryptocurrency exchange BitMEX and Chief Investment Officer at Maelstrom Fund, expressed his views on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) trading, emphasizing the importance of fiat liquidity over specific price targets.
